top_gap_prompt: What is the best marketing automation for SaaS marketing leads and growth engineers building lifecycle flows?
category_long: behavior-based email automation platform for SaaS companies

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Encharge lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Encharge's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Encharge is under-represented in third-party 'best marketing automation' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best marketing automation for SaaS marketing leads and growth engineers building lifecycle flows?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable marketing automation tools instead of Intercom
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
